_comment: Custom Astroneer egg for Pterodactyl using a custom Debian+GE-Proton runtime image. Build the matching Dockerfile and push it to your registry, then replace the docker_images value below.
name: Astroneer Dedicated Server (Custom Proton Runtime)
author: OpenAI
description: Astroneer dedicated server for Pterodactyl using a custom Debian image with GE-Proton, Xvfb, SteamCMD, and a bootstrap script that writes current Astroneer config into /home/container.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p /mnt/server
echo 'This egg uses a custom runtime image. No separate install step is required here.'

variables.name: Owner Name
variables.description: Steam username that should become the server owner/admin on first join.

variables.name: Public IP
variables.description: Public IPv4 address clients should use. Leave blank to auto-detect via ipify.

variables.name: Domain Name
variables.description: Optional FQDN to resolve to IPv4 if Public IP auto-detection is unsuitable.

variables.name: Disable Encryption
variables.description: Legacy troubleshooting mode only. 0=keep encryption enabled, 1=disable it.

variables.name: Active Save Name
variables.description: Save name without the timestamp suffix. Default SAVE_1.
